title: cosmea parviflora
intro: Cosmea parviflora, also known as the small-flowered cosmos, is a plant species that belongs to the asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Cosmea parviflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
